CVE-2017-1000159.description: Command injection in evince via filename when printing to PDF. This affects versions earlier than 3.25.91.

CVE-2017-9083.title: poppler 0.54.0, as used in Evince and other products, has a NULL  ...
CVE-2017-9083.description: poppler 0.54.0, as used in Evince and other products, has a NULL pointer dereference in the JPXStream::readUByte function in JPXStream.cc. For example, the perf_test utility will crash (segmentation fault) when parsing an invalid PDF file.
